name: Community Honey Network
description: CHN aims to make deployments honeypots and honeypot management tools easy and flexible. The default deployment method uses Docker Compose and Docker to deploy with a few simple commands. Tool: https://communityhoneynetwork.readthedocs.io/en/stable/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #450 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Community Honey Network output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Community Honey Network output file to parse instead of running it live.
